list.name: Default
list.comment:
Version 0.82
Do not build OSX versions.

recent.name: C:\Users\Eric Terrell\Documents\software development\Vault3.Desktop\Java Vault\Vault\ant build scripts

task.summary:
Version 0.70
Bug Fix: main window is no longer drawn, hidden, and moved when app is launched.
Toolbar now has grey background again.
Bug Fix: On Linux (Mint) password prompt dialog was missing the title. Setting shell to null fixed it.
Bug Fix: On Linux (Mint) password prompt dialog was missing the title. Setting shell to null fixed it.
Added logging. Investigating why app doesn't come up maximized after being maximized and closed and re-opened.

Now saves/restores maximized window state.
One limitation - with multiple monitors, works perfectly on primary monitor. On secondary monitor, works correctly for non-maximized window. For maximized window, restores maximized to primary monitor.
No longer build source code .zip file as source code is in GitHub.
No longer build source code .zip file as source code is in GitHub.
No longer build source code .zip file as source code is in GitHub.
Added artwork for rotation menu items
Added artwork for rotation menu items
Added artwork for rotation menu items

Version 0.74
Bug Fix: vertical slider position was not properly restored after being moved.

Version 0.74
Bug Fix: vertical slider position was not properly restored after being moved.
Attempt to fix Mac OSX build.

Version 0.77
Bug Fix: In previous versions, in Linux, after displaying one image (photo), image display stopped working.

Version 0.77
Bug Fix: In previous versions, in Linux, after displaying one image (photo), image display stopped working.

MESSAGE.value:
Version 0.74
Bug Fix: vertical slider position was not properly restored after being moved.
Minor cleanup
Attempt to fix Mac OSX build.

Version 0.76
Updated to Eclipse 4.23 libraries.

Version 0.77
Bug Fix: In previous versions, in Linux, after displaying one image (photo), image display stopped working.

Version 0.78
Updated to Eclipse 4.29 dependencies. Updated copyright year to 2023. Vault 3 now requires Java 1.7. Java version now displayed in About dialog. There is now an OSX arm version.

Version 0.78
Added copyright notice to ant build scripts. No longer build aarch64 version (native libraries are not yet available)

Version 0.79
Added copyright notice to ant build scripts. No longer build aarch64 version (native libraries are not yet available)

Version 0.79
Replaced sqlite4java.jar with sqlite-jdbc-3.43.0.0.jar. Added an OSX "aarch64" version.
Fixed unit tests.

Version 0.80 Document Version 1.3
Improved encryption: 256-bit keys, CBC mode, improved key creation.
Updated example.vl3 to version 1.3.

Bug Fix:
File / New yielded a Vault 3 document of version "1.0". In this case the ciphertext was not stored properly, and the password validation failed.

Bug Fix:
Load a version 1.2 document. Now every time the document is saved, user gets a warning about upgrading the file.
Code inspection updates.

Version 0.81
Removed ability to email topics Removed Email tab in Settings dialog Removed corresponding on-line help content Re-wrote Send Feedback feature

Version 0.81
Removed ability to email topics Removed Email tab in Settings dialog Removed corresponding on-line help content Re-wrote Send Feedback feature
Updated ant build to build custom java runtime
Created Windows setup

Version 0.81
Removed ability to email topics Removed Email tab in Settings dialog Removed corresponding on-line help content Re-wrote Send Feedback feature Fixed CryptoTests.java
Updated ant build to build custom java runtime

Version 0.81
Removed ability to email topics Removed Email tab in Settings dialog Removed corresponding on-line help content Re-wrote Send Feedback feature
Updated ant build to build custom java runtime

Version 0.81
Removed ability to email topics Removed Email tab in Settings dialog Removed corresponding on-line help content Re-wrote Send Feedback feature
Updated ant build to build custom java runtime
Included jdk.crypto.ec module to allow app to download https:// content.

Version 0.81
Removed ability to email topics Removed Email tab in Settings dialog Removed corresponding on-line help content Re-wrote Send Feedback feature
Updated ant build to build custom java runtime
Included jdk.crypto.ec module to allow app to download https:// content.
No longer let user see previously-entered passwords in the Password dialog.
User now gets an error message when an incorrect password is entered.

Version 0.81
Removed ability to email topics Removed Email tab in Settings dialog Removed corresponding on-line help content Re-wrote Send Feedback feature
Updated ant build to build custom java runtime
Included jdk.crypto.ec module to allow app to download https:// content.
No longer let user see previously-entered passwords in the Password dialog.
User now gets an error message when an incorrect password is entered.
Current document is new cleared and named "Untitled" prior to loading a new document, in case the load fails.

Version 0.82
Bug Fix: In previous versions, an incorrect warning message could be displayed in the Settings dialog.

Version 0.82
Do not build OSX versions.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Version 0.82
Do not build OSX versions.
